articles.title: Gaza Platform: Mass Displacement Documentation
articles.summary: Forensic Architecture documents the mass displacement of Palestinian civilians carried out by the Israeli military in the Gaza Strip since October 7, 2023, identifying three overlapping phases in its execution.
articles.content:
Since 7 October 2023, Forensic Architecture has documented the mass displacement of Palestinian civilians being carried out by the Israeli military in the Gaza Strip, and identified three overlapping phases in its execution.

Across all three phases, the Israeli military has repeatedly abused the humanitarian measures of evacuation orders, 'safe routes', and 'safe zones', and failed to comply with the laws governing their application within a wartime context.

These patterns of systematic violence and destruction have forced Palestinian civilians from one unsafe area to the next, confirming the conclusion echoed across civilian testimonies, media reports, and assessments by the UN and other humanitarian aid organisations, that 'there is no safe place in Gaza'.

Our comprehensive evidence base includes satellite imagery analysis, witness testimonies, video documentation, geospatial mapping, and legal framework analysis.
articles.author: Forensic Architecture Team

ai_analysis.explanation: Comprehensive forensic investigation with extensive evidence base and legal analysis.

articles.title: Lethal Aid: Documentation of Military Support
articles.summary: Investigation into lethal aid and military support systems affecting Palestinian territories.
articles.content:
This investigation examines the flow of lethal aid and military support systems that have impacted Palestinian territories.

Forensic Architecture's investigation into lethal aid focuses on military equipment transfers, support systems analysis, impact assessment on civilian populations, and legal implications under international law.

Our investigation employs open source intelligence gathering, geospatial analysis, legal framework examination, and witness testimony collection.
articles.author: Forensic Architecture Team

ai_analysis.explanation: Detailed investigation into military support systems with comprehensive methodology.

articles.title: Humanitarian Violence: Abuse of Protection Measures
articles.summary: Analysis of how humanitarian protection measures have been systematically abused, putting Palestinian civilians at risk.
articles.content:
This investigation documents the systematic abuse of humanitarian protection measures in Palestinian territories.

The investigation reveals patterns of misuse of evacuation orders, abuse of 'safe route' designations, violation of 'safe zone' protections, and non-compliance with international humanitarian law.

These violations have resulted in forced displacement of civilian populations, increased vulnerability of protected persons, erosion of humanitarian space, and systematic targeting of civilian infrastructure.

The investigation examines violations under Geneva Conventions, Additional Protocols, Customary International Humanitarian Law, and Rome Statute provisions.
articles.author: Forensic Architecture Team

ai_analysis.explanation: Systematic analysis of humanitarian law violations with strong legal framework.

articles.title: Destruction of Medical Infrastructure
articles.summary: Comprehensive documentation of attacks on medical facilities and healthcare infrastructure in Palestinian territories.
articles.content:
This investigation documents the systematic destruction of medical infrastructure in Palestinian territories.

The investigation covers hospital attacks and damage, clinic destruction, medical equipment targeting, healthcare worker casualties, and ambulance attacks.

Medical facilities are protected under Geneva Convention IV, Additional Protocol I, Customary International Humanitarian Law, and WHO health facility protection guidelines.

The destruction has resulted in collapse of healthcare systems, increased civilian mortality, denial of medical care, and targeting of protected medical personnel.

Our methodology includes satellite imagery analysis, medical facility mapping, witness testimony collection, and legal framework analysis.
articles.author: Forensic Architecture Team

ai_analysis.explanation: Comprehensive documentation of medical infrastructure destruction with strong evidence base.

articles.title: Ecocide in Gaza: Environmental Destruction Investigation
articles.summary: Investigation into environmental destruction and ecocide in Gaza, examining the systematic targeting of environmental infrastructure.
articles.content:
This investigation examines the environmental destruction in Gaza and its classification as potential ecocide.

The investigation documents destruction of agricultural land, water infrastructure targeting, soil contamination, air quality degradation, and ecosystem collapse.

Examination under Rome Statute ecocide provisions, environmental protection laws, international humanitarian law, and environmental crime statutes.

The environmental destruction has resulted in loss of agricultural productivity, water scarcity and contamination, public health impacts, ecosystem degradation, and climate impact.

Our investigation employs environmental monitoring data, satellite imagery analysis, soil and water testing, and agricultural impact assessment.
articles.author: Forensic Architecture Team

ai_analysis.explanation: Environmental investigation with scientific methodology and legal analysis.

articles.title: Design by Destruction: Spatial Analysis
articles.summary: Spatial analysis of destruction patterns revealing systematic targeting of civilian infrastructure.
articles.content:
This investigation uses spatial analysis to reveal patterns of systematic destruction in Palestinian territories.

Our spatial analysis includes Geographic Information Systems (GIS), satellite imagery comparison, destruction pattern mapping, and infrastructure targeting analysis.

The analysis reveals systematic targeting patterns, infrastructure destruction sequences, civilian area prioritization, and strategic destruction planning.

The investigation includes before/after satellite imagery, 3D reconstruction models, interactive mapping platforms, and temporal analysis visualizations.

The patterns suggest intentional targeting of civilian objects, violations of distinction principle, disproportionate attacks, and collective punishment.
articles.author: Forensic Architecture Team

ai_analysis.explanation: Spatial analysis investigation with advanced GIS methodology and visual evidence.
